headline: Needham Remains Bullish on Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR)
summary: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) is one of the top must-buy semiconductor stocks to invest in now. Needham lifted the price target on Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) to $1,750 from $1,300 on May 1, maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that the company reported a solid […]
